Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm sorry to ask this so suddenly, but... can you come with me? There's... something we need to discuss.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Come with me to the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Isn't it... kinda weird that she'd only want to talk to him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Eh, probably big, important student council business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Maybe, but Senpai was acting a little weird...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}She had that look she gets when she's keeping some terrible secret.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Welp... Guess we might as well head home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hey, wait a sec, Junpei! According to the seating chart, if he's not here, you have to take over cleaning duty.[n]{f 1 1}
